interconnections.evidence: space_members table created (supabase/migrations/20250808004949_9d834cd4-abc1-415b-bb90-f5b98da966ad.sql); collaboration_memberships also exists
applications table with user_id->profiles(id) and opportunity_id->opportunities(id) (supabase/migrations/20251006141555_eaf1fc2f-60b0-447d-b4a5-2091742443a7.sql)

No table named contribute_applications. CONTRIBUTE flow uses contribution_offers (need_id->contribution_needs, created_by uuid). No FK from contribution_offers.created_by to profiles(id) declared, though convention is auth.users.id == profiles.id.
posts.author_id added with FK to auth.users(id) (supabase/migrations/20250727051046-8fe6333f-1b72-466b-a031-4194ba739d62.sql); posts.author_id used in triggers and RPCs
events.related_space_id UUID added; collaboration_spaces.related_event_id UUID added (supabase/migrations/20260212100001_post_composer_alter_tables.sql)
trg_event_create_thread AFTER INSERT trigger on events; trg_registration_join_thread on event_registrations (supabase/migrations/20260220050734_17849969-fae4-4ddd-aabb-dfb973ce758f.sql)
trg_space_create_channel on spaces and trg_collab_space_create_channel on collaboration_spaces; trg_space_member_join_channel on space_members

dia_match_results.match_category CHECK (people, opportunity, space, event) with matched_entity_id UUID. Note: NO dia_cards table; CONTRIBUTE not in match_category enum (only via 'opportunity' surface).

knownIssues.title: CONVEY Story badge color
knownIssues.note: Canonical Story card uses bg-dna-copper/90 (HSL 25 51% 46% = #B87333 family). Compliant. Note: ConveyStoryCard.tsx legacy variant uses bg-dna-gold/10 for 'story' subtype — different contexts.

knownIssues.title: CONVEY excerpt metadata leak
knownIssues.note: getExcerpt() in ConveyEditorialCards.tsx strips 'Read Time: X min | Tags: ...' headers and concatenated CamelCase hashtag blocks. Used at lines 280 and 478. However, raw story.content?.substring(0, N) without sanitization still appears at: ConveyCategorySection.tsx:151, ConveyTrendingSection.tsx:96, ConveyStoryCard.tsx:187/229/306, and several h3 title fallbacks in ConveyEditorialCards.tsx (258, 393, 474). Title fallbacks also leak metadata when story.title is empty.

knownIssues.title: CONTRIBUTE/COLLABORATE schema boundary
knownIssues.note: COLLABORATE = opportunities (title, description, type, status, visibility, tags, location, link) — public 'find a role' postings. CONTRIBUTE = contribution_needs (space_id REQUIRED, type, title, description, status, priority, focus_areas, region, target_amount, currency, time_commitment, duration, needed_by) PLUS contribution_offers (need_id REQUIRED, message, offered_amount). Distinct shapes: COLLABORATE is a marketplace; CONTRIBUTE is space-scoped need-fulfillment. Boundary is logically defensible — should NOT be unified. Overlap: both have title/description/status; both have user creator. Differences: CONTRIBUTE is space-required (FK), needs/offers paired model, has currency+target_amount, time_commitment, region; COLLABORATE is standalone, has role_type/organization/deadline/tags.

knownIssues.title: Sprint 1 Tier 1.3 — TypeScript any reduction
knownIssues.note: Goal: Sprint 5 reaches 50% reduction. Current: 337 undocumented `any` violations + 109 documented `supabase as any` exceptions = 446 total. No baseline shipped from Sprint 1 visible in this audit, but with strict:false, noImplicitAny:false, strictNullChecks:false in tsconfig.app.json there's no enforcement to drive reduction. Concrete next step: enable strictNullChecks first (smallest blast radius), then noImplicitAny.

knownIssues.title: tsconfig strict mode disabled
knownIssues.note: strict:false, noImplicitAny:false, strictNullChecks:false — explicitly disabled. tsc --noEmit returns 0 errors but only because rules are off. No actual type safety guarantee from current TS config.

knownIssues.title: ESLint configuration broken
knownIssues.note: `npm run lint` fails with TypeError in @typescript-eslint/no-unused-expressions rule (peer dep mismatch with ESLint 9.39.2). Lint cannot run currently.

knownIssues.title: Main bundle exceeds 500 KB
knownIssues.note: index chunk: 1.7 MB raw / 513 KB gzipped. Vite warns 'Some chunks are larger than 500 kB after minification'. Largest contributors likely: html2canvas, recharts (generateCategoricalChart 326 KB), Encoder 389 KB, emoji-picker 270 KB. Consider manualChunks splitting and lazy-loading these.

knownIssues.title: Legacy /dna/Impact page orphaned
knownIssues.note: App.tsx:55 lazy-imports DnaImpact, but App.tsx:639 routes /dna/impact to <Navigate to="/dna/contribute" replace />. The component is never rendered. File should be deleted and import removed.

knownIssues.title: DIA matching does not include CONTRIBUTE category
knownIssues.note: dia_match_results.match_category CHECK only allows ('people', 'opportunity', 'space', 'event'). Direct contribution_needs/contribution_offers matching not surfaced via DIA. Acceptable if 'opportunity' is the canonical surface, but the CHECK constraint blocks future expansion to a 'contribute' category.

knownIssues.title: N+1: PostCard issues 6 useQuery calls per item
knownIssues.note: PostCard issues 6 separate useQuery calls per render (author, likeCount, hasLiked, commentCount, shareCount, isSaved). On a feed of N posts: 6×N round-trips. Should be replaced with a single batched query in the parent that joins author + counts + viewer-state via .select('*, profiles(*), post_reactions(...)'). Same pattern in CommentSection.tsx CommentItem (3 calls per comment).

knownIssues.title: N+1: CommentItem issues 3 useQuery calls per item
knownIssues.note: Each CommentItem renders 3 useQuery calls (author, likeCount, hasLiked). On a long thread that's 3×N queries. Batch in parent useQuery using select('*, author:profiles(id, display_name, avatar_url), comment_likes(user_id)').

knownIssues.title: Loop INSERT in badge backfill
knownIssues.note: for-of loop performs `await supabase.from('profile_badges').insert(...)` per badge rule. Replace with single `.insert(badgesArray)`. Low impact since this only runs at badge backfill events.
